title: Slightly Vulkan
description: A Vanilla+ Optimization Modpack using VulkanMod & Beryl.
body:
# Slightly Vulkan

**A Vanilla+ Optimization Modpack using VulkanMod & Beryl.**

_This is basically the Vulkan version of my [Slightly Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/project/msQ9nxl6) Modpack._

This modpack allows you to play on Multiplayer servers just as you would with a Vanilla Client. 
But with way more FPS, better graphics/atmosphere and Quality of Life improvements offering you a more enjoyable experience.

![Slightly Vulkan Icon, resembling a vanilla fruit in red with a thin white border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/464987b376ad1326a3202dd579d6015cb99c9aad.png)

## Slightly Vulkan is adding

- nearly every available Vulkan-compatible Performance Mod from Modrinth
- better Atmosphere
- better Graphics
- QoL improvements
- Privacy Enhancements

## Included Shaders

- [Beryl](https://modrinth.com/mod/beryl) by xCollateral

## Included Resource Packs

- [Chat Reporting Helper](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chat-reporting-helper) by robotkoer
- [Emissive TXF](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/emissive-txf) by jahirtrap
- [Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves) by Motschen
- [Translations for Sodium](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translations-for-sodium) by robotkoer, FlashyReese

## Included Mods:
This Modlist is always referring to the latest Slightly Vulkan Version.
